news.headline: Balochistan fixes price of Iranian petrol at Rs280
news.summary:
<p>QUETTA: The Balochistan government on Saturday fixed the price of Iranian smuggled petrol at Rs280 per litre and announced that strict action would be taken against those charging more than this rate.</p>

news.headline: Rains in KP, Punjab kill six amid new spell forecast
news.summary:
<p>ISLAMABAD: While rain and windstorms kill­ed at least six people across Punjab and Khyber Pakht­unkhwa, authorities have war­ned that the impact may worsen, with a fresh spell of rains forecast in the coming days across the country.</p>

news.headline: ICE wanted to build a detention centre -  this small farming town said no
news.summary: Residents say they support the administration's immigration agenda - but not its plans to build a detention centre in their backyard.

news.headline: Israel Strikes Iran’s Largest Petrochemical Complex
